task: Capture FREE Black pieces in 3 moves!
hint: Rook can take D5 pawn. Knight on F6 is defended!

task: Three pieces! Capture only the undefended ones!
hint: C5 and E5 pawns are free. Queen on D7 is protected.

task: Find the free piece and capture it!
hint: Rook on D5 is undefended! Bishop on C8 is protected.
